    Constructors in controller with parameters of type Player
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CombatController(Player p1, Player p2)
    Deprecated.
    Please use CombatController(Player, Player, Difficulty).
     
    CombatController(Player p1, Player p2, CombatController.Difficulty diff)
    Constructor that takes references to the two player objects that will be involved in a given fight.
